name: SX126x Component
description: The SX126x component allows you to configure the SX1261, SX1262, SX1268 and LLCC68 transceivers ([datasheet](https://www.semtech.com/products/wireless-rf/lora-connect/sx1262#documentation)) in ESPHome. Transceivers are connected via the [SPI Bus](https://esphome.io/components/spi). Supported frequencies range from 150 MHz to 960 MHz, including the popular 315 MHz, 433 MHz, 868 MHz, and 915 MHz ISM bands. Supported modulations include LoRa, FSK, GFSK, MSK and GMSK. The SX126x component may be used as a platform for the [Packet Transport Component](https://esphome.io/components/packet_transport#packet-transport) component, enabling sensor data to be sent directly from one ESPHome node to another.

config_entries.label: Busy Pin
config_entries.description: Busy pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: SPI chip select pin.

config_entries.label: DIO1 Pin
config_entries.description: Digital IO pin 1.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Frequency
config_entries.description: Frequency in Hz of the transceiver.

config_entries.label: Hw Version
config_entries.description: Valid values are `sx1261`, `sx1262`, `sx1268` or `llcc68`.

config_entries.label: Modulation
config_entries.description: Modulation can be `FSK` or `LORA`.

config_entries.label: RF Switch
config_entries.description: Used to indicate if DIO2 controls an external RF switch.

config_entries.label: RST Pin
config_entries.description: Reset pin.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Bitrate
config_entries.description: Bit rate of the signal. Normally the inverse of the bit duration, eg 1 / 208 us is 4800 bps.

config_entries.label: Coding Rate
config_entries.description: Coding rate, values can be `CR_4_5`, `CR_4_6`, `CR_4_7` or `CR_4_8`. Defaults to `CR_4_5`.

config_entries.label: CRC Enable
config_entries.description: Enables a 16 bit CRC calculation/check. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: CRC Initial
config_entries.description: Initial CRC value as a hex integer. Defaults to 0x1D0F.

config_entries.label: CRC Inverted
config_entries.description: Inverts the CRC if enabled. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: CRC Polynomial
config_entries.description: CRC polynomial as a hex integer. Defaults to 0x1021.

config_entries.label: CRC Size
config_entries.description: Size of the CRC in bytes, either 1 or 2. Defaults to 2.

config_entries.label: Deviation
config_entries.description: Transmitter FSK frequency deviation, values range from 0 to 100 kHz. Defaults to `5kHz`.

config_entries.label: PA Power
config_entries.description: Transmitter power, range is from -3 to 15 dBm when `hw_version` is `sx1261` and from -3 to 22 dBm otherwise.

config_entries.label: PA Ramp
config_entries.description: Transmitter PA ramp, can be `10us`, `20us`, `40us`, `80us`, `200us`, `800us`, `1700us` or `3400us`.

config_entries.label: Payload Length
config_entries.description: Length of the packet. Maximum length is 255.

config_entries.label: Preamble Detect
config_entries.description: Minimum length of the preamble in bytes required by the receiver. Preamble detector is disabled if the size is 0 and its value capped at 4.

config_entries.label: Preamble Size
config_entries.description: Length of the preamble in bytes to be sent by the transmitter. This value should be larger than `preamble_detect` on the receive side to allow time for the receiver’s AFC and AGC to adjust.

config_entries.label: RX Start
config_entries.description: Start the receiver automatically on boot or after transmitting.

config_entries.label: Shaping
config_entries.description: Transmitter data shaping can be `GAUSSIAN_BT_0_3`, `GAUSSIAN_BT_0_5`, `GAUSSIAN_BT_0_7`, `GAUSSIAN_BT_1_0` or `NONE`.

config_entries.label: Spreading Factor
config_entries.description: Spreading factor, values range from 6 to 12. Defaults to 7.

config_entries.label: Sync Value
config_entries.description: Synchronization bytes, list of 1 to 8 bytes, found after the preamble and before the payload.

config_entries.label: Tcxo Delay
config_entries.description: The time needed for the TCXO to stabilize.

config_entries.label: Tcxo Voltage
config_entries.description: Reference voltage of the external TCXO controlled by DIO3. If there is no TCXO this should be set to `NONE`. Values can be `1_6V`, `1_7V`, `1_8V`, `2_2V`, `2_4V`, `2_7V`, `3_0V`, `3_3V` or `NONE`.
